body_excerpt: In Confirmation of keystore_cli_v2.cpp, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a double free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in an unprivileged process with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
